channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Dual-Screen Laptop with Hidden Touchpad Costs Just $368 - A Game-Changer in Affordable Computing?
item.description: Chinese laptop vendor Topton has innovated with a touchpad that can be docked inside the keyboard, dual screens, and a more powerful Core i3-1215U CPU. The device costs far less than expected and offers up to 32GB of RAM and a 2TB SSD.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: 'Battlestar Galactica' is 'even more relevant now,' star says
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft employees protest at 50th anniversary party over Israel contract
item.description: A pro-Palestinian protest by Microsoft employees interrupted the company’s 50th anniversary celebration Friday, the latest backlash over the tech industry’s work to supply artificial intelligence technology to the Israeli military.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: TikTok deal pulled after Trump tariff announcement
item.description: A finalized TikTok deal was pulled Thursday after President Trump announced massive new tariffs against China, a source familiar with the negotiations told The Hill. Trump was poised to sign an executive order approving a deal that would have seen TikTok’s U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft 365: A guide to the updates
item.description: Microsoft 365 (and Office 365) subscribers get more frequent software updates than those who have purchased Office without a subscription, which means subscribers have access to the latest features, security patches, and bug fixes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: At 50, Microsoft highlights AI and Copilot as the company’s future
item.description: At a special 50th anniversary event on Friday, Microsoft executives reflected on the company’s storied past and on how it’s now reinventing itself for an AI-focused future.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump administration rolls back forest protections in bid to ramp up logging
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration has rolled back environmental protections around future logging projects on more than half of U.S. national forests under an emergency designation issued Friday that cites the dangers of wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Brown, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Google Cloud Next ’25: What to expect
item.description: Google Cloud Next ’25, which runs from April 9-11 in Las Vegas ,will showcase the latest advancements and future directions of Google Cloud Platform and cloud computing in general.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nintendo delays Switch 2 US preorders over Trump tariffs
item.description: Nintendo said U.S. preorders of its Switch 2 console will not take place on April 9 as it assesses tariff implications.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: An AI avatar tried to argue a case before a New York court. The judges weren't having it
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It took only seconds for the judges on a New York appeals court to realize that the man addressing them from a video screen — a person about to present an argument in a lawsuit — not only had no law degree, but didn't exist at all.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: AI vs. pro gambler's $1 million March Madness bet coming down to Duke and Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — The $1 million March Madness wager between a pro gambler and an artificial-intelligence site will be decided by the winner of the Duke-Houston game in the Final Four. The Vegas bookies project the gambler, who picked 5 1/2-point favorite Duke, should win.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How to troubleshoot and reset Windows Update
item.description: Like it or not, those who use Windows Update to obtain and install updates, patches, and fixes will occasionally encounter issues. Sometimes, a specific update may not download. At other times, an update may fail to install. Every now and then, Windows Update (a.k.a.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: High-tech canopy provides off-grid power and water
item.description: The EO Canopy is a self-sustaining, solar-powered camping platform designed to provide all the comforts of home while completely off the grid.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Trump's tariffs are so bad for Big Tech
item.description: President Trump’s sweeping new slate of tariffs is poised to strike a blow at the tech industry, as massive import taxes on China and Taiwan disrupt trade flows that are central to tech firms’ business models.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: 9 principles to improve IT supplier relationship management
item.description: As with any other skill, focusing on specific principles and practices can improve your relationship management skills. This will create stronger alignment between both sides and a framework that results in true win-wins.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Many CIOs operate within a culture of fear
item.description: Many IT leaders say they work in organizations that operate with a culture of blame, making it difficult to admit mistakes and then learn from errors.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cobas Asset Management moderniza su atención al cliente con un asistente virtual impulsado por IA
item.description: Cobas Asset Management ha puesto en marcha un nuevo proyecto con vistas a mejorar la experiencia de usuario en su web y en su área privada gracias a la incorporación de un asistente virtual.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cómo empezar a desarrollar una estrategia equilibrada de gobernanza de la IA
item.description: La mejor defensa es un buen ataque, ¿verdad? Cuando se trata de la gobernanza de la IA, las organizaciones necesitan ambas cosas.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Explorando la confluencia de la tecnología y la sostenibilidad para un futuro mejor
item.description: Los esfuerzos de sostenibilidad están cobrando fuerza a escala mundial, y los gobiernos y las organizaciones están poniendo todo su empeño en la formulación y aplicación de políticas que puedan detener o incluso revertir el daño medioambiental global y crear un impacto positivo para las comunidades
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Dr Arvind Gupta: Trustworthy systems to empower India’s growing economy
item.description: Digital India Foundation, a policy think tank working in the areas of technology policy, digital inclusion, ethics of AI, supply-chain security, and governance of critical and emerging technologies. Dr.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google’s Gemini 2.5 Pro could be the most important AI model so far this year
item.description: Google released its new Gemini 2.5 Pro Experimental AI model late last month, and it’s quickly stacked up top marks on a number of coding, math, and reasoning benchmark tests—making it a contender for the world’s best model right now.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Brown University to see half a billion in federal funding halted by Trump administration
item.description: A White House official says the Trump administration is planning to halt more than half a billion dollars in contracts and grants awarded to Brown University.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne Mumphrey And Seung Min Kim, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Sonatype warns of 18,000 open source malware packages
item.description: Software supply chain security company Sonatype uncovered 17,954 open-source malware packages during Q1 2025, the company revealed in its Open Source Malware Index. Sonatype’s Open Source Malware Index for Q1 2025 was introduced April 2.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How Elon Musk’s political gambit could tarnish his legacy at Tesla
item.description: Tech leaders often brand themselves as “disruptors”—and few fit that label more snugly than Elon Musk. In the three months since joining Donald Trump in the White House following Trump’s election, Musk has certainly disrupted Washington.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: DHS plans to slash HQ workforce, including AI experts
item.description: DHS is planning sweeping workforce cuts across its Management Directorate, with targets including the AI Corps and the CX Directorate. The post DHS plans to slash HQ workforce, including AI experts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Tariff war throws building of data centers into disarray
item.description: Enterprise IT leaders are facing a double-whammy of uncertainties complicating their data center building decisions: The ever-changing realities of genAI strategies, and the back-and-forth nature of the current tariff wars pushed by the United States. “This is obviously a fluid situation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: Coverage of Nvidia GTC 2025 With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Potential Nvidia chip shortage looms as Chinese customers rush to beat US sales ban
item.description: The AI chip shortage could become even more dire as Chinese customers are purportedly looking to hoard Nvidia chips ahead of a proposed US sales ban.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After TikTok was banned in the United States earlier this year, President Donald Trump gave the platform a reprieve, barreling past a law that was passed in Congress and upheld unanimously by the Supreme Court that said the ban was necessary for national security.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: At the VA, modernizing healthcare delivery rests in patient’s control of their data
item.description: Neil Evans, acting program executive director for electronic health record modernization at VA said the VA has always had some form of electronic health record. The post At the VA, modernizing healthcare delivery rests in patient’s control of their data first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Prioritizing an enterprisewide cyber culture in 2025
item.description: The three keys to building a resilient cyber culture is demonstrating leadership commitment, continually improving and staying flexible. The post Prioritizing an enterprisewide cyber culture in 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: What one giant industry likes and dislikes about DOGE
item.description: The Consumer Technology Association is a big industry that has mixed feelings about the Trump-Musk-DOGE approach to the government. The post What one giant industry likes and dislikes about DOGE first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tech startup, major airline partner to launch electric air taxi service
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses Joby Aviation and Virgin Atlantic planning to launch 200-mph U.K. air taxis linking airports and cities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
